summary: GharSetu Iteration 13 - Owner Dashboard Features Testing Complete. All new features working: Analytics section with stats cards and weekly chart, Leads section with customer inquiries and premium upgrade banner, Subscription section with ₹251/month pricing and features list. Subscription APIs fully functional.
passed_tests: Weekly Performance chart with Mon-Sun bars: PASSED
Premium upgrade banner for non-subscribed users: PASSED
No Leads Yet empty state: PASSED
Feature: Priority in search results: PASSED
Feature: Verified badge on profile: PASSED
Feature: See full customer contact details: PASSED
Secure payment via Razorpay text: PASSED
POST /api/subscriptions/create-order - returns plan_details with features: PASSED
GET /api/subscriptions/status - returns price and features: PASSED
critical_code_review_comments: Analytics section properly displays stats cards with gradient backgrounds and icons
Weekly Performance chart shows mock data (Mon-Sun) with views and inquiries legend
Leads section shows premium upgrade banner for non-subscribed users with call-to-action
Subscription UI properly shows ₹251/month pricing with crown icon and features list
Subscription tab only visible for service_provider role (role-based visibility working)
Subscription APIs return proper Razorpay integration data (order_id, key_id, amount)
MOCKED: Weekly analytics chart data is mock data for demo (as documented)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 13 tested Owner Dashboard new features: 1) Analytics section with 4 stats cards (Views, Inquiries, Revenue, Likes) and Weekly Performance chart (mock data). 2) Leads section with premium upgrade banner and Customer Inquiries list. 3) Subscription section with ₹251/month pricing and 6 features. Subscription tab only visible for service_provider role. All APIs working.

Owner_Dashboard_Sidebar.details: Shows Analytics, Leads, Subscription buttons. Subscription tab only for service_provider role.

Analytics_Section.details: Stats cards (Total Views, Inquiries, Revenue, Likes), Weekly Performance chart, Top Performing Listings section

Leads_Section.details: Customer Inquiries list with premium upgrade banner for non-subscribed users

Subscription_Section.details: ₹251/month pricing, Service Provider Plan badge, 6 features list, Subscribe Now button

mocked_apis.Weekly_Analytics_Chart: MOCKED - Uses mock data for weekly performance chart (Mon-Sun views/inquiries)
